items.name: log-it-dont-fix-it
items.content: When you discover a bug, inconsistency, or concern while working on something else, file a GitHub issue — do not fix it inline. Scope creep is how PRs become unreviewable.

items.name: match-tasks-to-energy
items.content: Consider energy cost, activation friction, and current energy state when suggesting tasks. Recommend low-friction tasks during low-energy periods and reserve high-cost tasks for peak capacity.
